PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc -Force; Write-Host "Encerrado PID $proc" } else { Write-Host "Porta livre" })

PowerShell(cd c:\\desenv\\estudo-app; $p = Start-Process -FilePath "go" -ArgumentList "run","." -PassThru -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\k8slab_err.log" -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\k8slab_out.log" -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; try { $pages = @\("/","/lab","/docs","/static/main.css"\); foreach \($pg in $pages\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080$pg" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "$pg -> $\($r.StatusCode\) \($\($r.Content.Length\) bytes\)" } catch { Write-Output "$pg -> ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } } } finally { Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output "---- stderr ----"; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\k8slab_err.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 20)

PowerShell(cd c:\\desenv\\estudo-app; $env:PORT="8099"; $p = Start-Process -FilePath "go" -ArgumentList "run","." -PassThru -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\k8slab_err2.log" -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\k8slab_out2.log" -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 7; try { $pages = @\("/","/lab","/docs","/argocd","/static/main.css"\); foreach \($pg in $pages\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8099$pg" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "$pg -> $\($r.StatusCode\) \($\($r.Content.Length\) bytes\)" } catch { Write-Output "$pg -> ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } } } finally { Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Process -Name "estudo-app","main" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output "---- stderr ----"; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\k8slab_err2.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 20)

PowerShell(cd c:\\desenv\\estudo-app; $env:PORT="8099"; $p = Start-Process -FilePath "go" -ArgumentList "run","." -PassThru -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\k8slab_err3.log" -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\k8slab_out3.log" -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 7; try { $list = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8099/lab" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $m = [regex]::Match\($list.Content, '/lab/\([a-zA-Z0-9_\\-]+\)"'\); $id = $m.Groups[1].Value; Write-Output "first lab id: $id"; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8099/lab/$id" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "/lab/$id -> $\($r.StatusCode\) \($\($r.Content.Length\) bytes\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'term-window' -and $r.Content -match 'terminal-container'\) { Write-Output "terminal markup: OK" } } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } finally { Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue })

PowerShell(cd c:\\desenv\\estudo-app; go build ./... 2>&1; if \($?\) { $env:PORT="8099"; $p = Start-Process -FilePath "go" -ArgumentList "run","." -PassThru -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\k8slab_e.log" -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\k8slab_o.log" -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 7; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8099/lab" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "/lab -> $\($r.StatusCode\) \($\($r.Content.Length\) bytes\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'lab-tile'\) { Write-Output 'WARN: grid ainda presente' } else { Write-Output 'grid removido: OK' }; if \($r.Content -match 'INICIAR SESSÃO'\) { Write-Output 'configurador: OK' } } catch { Write-Output "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } finally { Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } })

PowerShell(cd c:\\desenv\\estudo-app; go build -o "$env:TEMP\\k8slab_test.exe" . 2>&1; if \($?\) { $env:PORT="8099"; $p = Start-Process -FilePath "$env:TEMP\\k8slab_test.exe" -PassThru -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\k8slab_e.log" -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\k8slab_o.log" -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8099/lab" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "/lab -> $\($r.StatusCode\) \($\($r.Content.Length\) bytes\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'lab-tile'\) { Write-Output 'WARN: grid ainda presente' } else { Write-Output 'grid removido: OK' }; if \($r.Content -match 'INICIAR SESS'\) { Write-Output 'configurador: OK' }; if \($r.Content -match 'disponíveis'\) { Write-Output 'contagens agregadas: OK' } } catch { Write-Output "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } finally { Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8099 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; cd c:\\desenv\\estudo-app; $env:PORT="8099"; $p = Start-Process -FilePath "$env:TEMP\\k8slab_t.exe" -PassThru -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { foreach \($id in @\('cka-lab-055','cka-lab-056','cka-lab-060','cka-lab-065','cka-lab-067','cka-lab-068'\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8099/lab/$id" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction Stop; $hasGoal = if \($r.Content.Contains\('goal-btn-0'\)\) {'com CHECK'} else {'sem goals'}; Write-Output "/lab/$id -> $\($r.StatusCode\) $hasGoal" } catch { Write-Output "/lab/$id -> redirect/404 \(nao existe\)" } } } finally { Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Remove-Item "$env:TEMP\\k8slab_t.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

Bash(wsl.exe -- bash -c "kubectl create deployment cloud-web --image=nginx:1.25 --replicas=2 2>&1; kubectl rollout status deployment/cloud-web --timeout=120s 2>&1; echo '---PODS---'; kubectl get pods -o wide -l app=cloud-web --no-headers 2>&1; echo '---CLEANUP---'; kubectl delete deployment cloud-web 2>&1")

Bash(wsl.exe -- bash -c 'for i in $\(seq 1 60\); do pgrep -f "minikube start" >/dev/null || break; sleep 5; done; echo "minikube start finalizado"; kubectl config use-context k8s-study-lab && kubectl config current-context')
